## Sunset Execution Checklist
- [ ] User impact reviewed and communicated
- [ ] Data retention/deletion plan approved
- [ ] Fallback workflow enabled
- [ ] Support and incident runbook updated
- [ ] Post-sunset retrospective scheduled
